metadata.title: Liquide-Trade, Invest In Stock
metadata.description:
Welcome to Liquide, your trusted partner in the stock market and mutual fund investing! As India's premier SEBI Registered Research Analyst, we bring you a cutting-edge financial advisory experience like no other. With Liquide, you can equip yourself with powerful tools, expert insights, and AI-driven solutions, in one place.

Key Features:

1. Stock Trade Recommendations 📈:
Embark on an exciting trading journey with Liquide's curated stock trade recommendations. Whether you're looking for quick wins or long-term our advice spans, Short-term, Mid-term, and Long-term trade recommendations to match your investment goals.

2. Portfolio Health Analysis 📊:
Unlock valuable insights into your investment portfolio within minutes of connecting your broker account. Our portfolio health analysis not only provides a comprehensive score but helps identify potential red flags & ensures sector diversification in your holdings.

3. Mutual Fund Analytics 📊:
Introducing our new Mutual Fund Analytics! Get detailed analytics and insights into mutual funds, identify red flags, and take informed actions. This tool helps you make better investment decisions and optimize your mutual fund portfolio.

4. AI-Powered BOT - LiMo 🤖🗣️:
Meet LiMo, India's pioneering AI-powered BOT! LiMo offers real-time BUY/SELL/HOLD ratings for stocks and serves as your round-the-clock trading partner. Whether you're seeking advice or just looking to chat about stocks, LiMo is here to provide instant guidance.

5. IPO Verdicts 💡:
Stay ahead of the IPO game with Liquide's IPO verdicts. We provide expert insights to help you make informed decisions about upcoming Initial Public Offerings. Don't miss out on exciting investment opportunities.

6. Watchlist 📺👀:
Effortlessly track your favorite stocks by adding them to your personalized watchlist. Stay updated on daily market movements with ease, ensuring you never miss a beat.

7. Stock Alerts 🚨💰:
Take control of your investments by setting personalized stock price alerts. Liquide will notify you the moment your desired price is reached, ensuring you never miss a trading opportunity again.

8. Stock Insights 📰🔍:
Dive deep into the stock market with Liquide's real-time news signals and detailed stock insights. Stay informed and make strategic decisions with confidence, armed with the latest information.

9. Market Sentiment 📊🗞️:
Get a daily pulse on the market with our market sentiment feature. Stay ahead of market trends and make informed investment choices based on the prevailing mood.

10. Baskets 📦✨:
Introducing Liquide's Baskets, curated collections of stocks, ETFs, and gold designed to help you diversify your portfolio. Our Baskets are crafted to cater to different investment strategies, making it easier for you to spread risk and optimize returns.

11. Academy 🎓📚:
Empower yourself with knowledge through our exclusive Academy. Access over 100 hours of in-depth stock market courses, designed to help you learn and grow in the world of investing. Whether you're a beginner or an experienced investor, there's always room to enhance your skills.

Liquide is more than just an app; it's your trusted partner for stock market and mutual fund success. 
FAQs:
1. Do you hold my money or stocks?
No, we don’t! All trades are safely executed through your broker.
2. Do you share my social and portfolio data with anyone?
No, no and no! Your data is secure with us and not shared with anyone.
3. Do you buy or sell on my behalf?
Not at all! You make your own decisions - be it buying or selling, we don’t take action for you.
4. Can I delete my Liquide account?
If you wish to delete your account, please email us at support@liquide.life. Security - Multiple layers of protection ensure that your data is safe and secure.
Liquide is a SEBI registered Research Analyst, Registration no. INH000009816
DISCLAIMER:
Stock investing is subject to market risks. Please trade with extreme care and do your own research before investing in stocks
metadata.description_html:
Welcome to Liquide, your trusted partner in the stock market and mutual fund investing! As India's premier SEBI Registered Research Analyst, we bring you a cutting-edge financial advisory experience like no other. With Liquide, you can equip yourself with powerful tools, expert insights, and AI-driven solutions, in one place.

Key Features:

1. Stock Trade Recommendations 📈:
Embark on an exciting trading journey with Liquide's curated stock trade recommendations. Whether you're looking for quick wins or long-term our advice spans, Short-term, Mid-term, and Long-term trade recommendations to match your investment goals.

2. Portfolio Health Analysis 📊:
Unlock valuable insights into your investment portfolio within minutes of connecting your broker account. Our portfolio health analysis not only provides a comprehensive score but helps identify potential red flags & ensures sector diversification in your holdings.

3. Mutual Fund Analytics 📊:
Introducing our new Mutual Fund Analytics! Get detailed analytics and insights into mutual funds, identify red flags, and take informed actions. This tool helps you make better investment decisions and optimize your mutual fund portfolio.

4. AI-Powered BOT - LiMo 🤖🗣️:
Meet LiMo, India's pioneering AI-powered BOT! LiMo offers real-time BUY/SELL/HOLD ratings for stocks and serves as your round-the-clock trading partner. Whether you're seeking advice or just looking to chat about stocks, LiMo is here to provide instant guidance.

5. IPO Verdicts 💡:
Stay ahead of the IPO game with Liquide's IPO verdicts. We provide expert insights to help you make informed decisions about upcoming Initial Public Offerings. Don't miss out on exciting investment opportunities.

6. Watchlist 📺👀:
Effortlessly track your favorite stocks by adding them to your personalized watchlist. Stay updated on daily market movements with ease, ensuring you never miss a beat.

7. Stock Alerts 🚨💰:
Take control of your investments by setting personalized stock price alerts. Liquide will notify you the moment your desired price is reached, ensuring you never miss a trading opportunity again.

8. Stock Insights 📰🔍:
Dive deep into the stock market with Liquide's real-time news signals and detailed stock insights. Stay informed and make strategic decisions with confidence, armed with the latest information.

9. Market Sentiment 📊🗞️:
Get a daily pulse on the market with our market sentiment feature. Stay ahead of market trends and make informed investment choices based on the prevailing mood.

10. Baskets 📦✨:
Introducing Liquide's Baskets, curated collections of stocks, ETFs, and gold designed to help you diversify your portfolio. Our Baskets are crafted to cater to different investment strategies, making it easier for you to spread risk and optimize returns.

11. Academy 🎓📚:
Empower yourself with knowledge through our exclusive Academy. Access over 100 hours of in-depth stock market courses, designed to help you learn and grow in the world of investing. Whether you're a beginner or an experienced investor, there's always room to enhance your skills.

Liquide is more than just an app; it's your trusted partner for stock market and mutual fund success.
FAQs:
1. Do you hold my money or stocks?
No, we don’t! All trades are safely executed through your broker.
2. Do you share my social and portfolio data with anyone?
No, no and no! Your data is secure with us and not shared with anyone.
3. Do you buy or sell on my behalf?
Not at all! You make your own decisions - be it buying or selling, we don’t take action for you.
4. Can I delete my Liquide account?
If you wish to delete your account, please email us at support@liquide.life. Security - Multiple layers of protection ensure that your data is safe and secure.
Liquide is a SEBI registered Research Analyst, Registration no. INH000009816
DISCLAIMER:
Stock investing is subject to market risks. Please trade with extreme care and do your own research before investing in stocks
metadata.summary: Welcome to Liquide, your trusted partner in the stock market and mutual fund investing! As India's premier SEBI Registered Research Analyst, we bring you a cutting-edge financial advisory experience l

reviews.author: Navneet Singh
reviews.content: The app appears to share trade information only after the trade has been closed, presenting it as a successful achievement. You won't receive prior notifications about trades. Although the app claims an 85% accuracy rate in notifications, the trades are often closed before any notification is captured. Later, they are displayed in the app as "open" and "closed" trades. Initially, I thought I might be missing the notifications, so I set the app to priority it but the issue persisted.

reviews.author: Shraban Sen
reviews.content: The experience is worst. All the advice given through WhatsApp is not acceptable. The profit % shown by the app. is wrong and baseless. Interestingly, I want to share my experience of the so called 'arjun' plan. First, the discount was 40% for 1 year subscription and when I didnt subscribe the discount rate increased to 60%. And the app always recommend subscription of 1 year. By which after payment the dissatisfied customer can't do anything.

reviews.author: kalpesh sachde
reviews.content: Zero star worst application, Their ad appears on social media, in which the influencer says that this company is SEBI registered. I have taken its early plan and all the money is lost. These people do not give any proper advice. They do not have any knowledge about the stock. If they just put it in from inside then say buy or sell it. The application is not that friendly, there are a lot of complications, After the trade is closed, they give performance. No one has given live trade till now.

reviews.author: premdeep singh
reviews.content: -5 star.I won't recommend it. I have invested in 5 of their suggestions 2 hit stop loss and others are around 15% loss.Save your money and stay away from this app. They send thousands of useless notifications on mobile and whatsapp even after doing stop on whatsapp and stopping app as well. no use app. useless. I complained on their support for stopping 50+ notifications per day. they don't solve instead close tickets. sometimes 24hrs window still nothing and told me to close app notifications.

reviews.author: snehil sahu
reviews.content: Never go for this app and its subscription. All fake recommendations for equity. Always a loss case. The black subscription is worst. No one will follow up with you as promised while buying it. No weekly or monthly recommendations provided after opting for its premium subscription black. Dont waste your money in the app. False cancellation promises

reviews.author: VINAY K R
reviews.content: i made 8 option trade from 22-4-2026 onwards till 28-4-2026, all of them went in loss, useless app don't follow suggestions blindly. lost nearly 50k by taking 3k subscription. i suggest don't take subscription. even if they give free suggestions think twice before execution.

reviews.author: PRAVVEEN KUMAR VAITLA
reviews.content: Don't purchase thus app, no one responding and Mutual fund profoikio not working from past 3 months, and what ever calls you get all are very false, waste of money, don't be trap in discount package messages...Wrost and very pathetic. I lost money paying subscription....

reviews.author: Pavan Kota
reviews.content: Just money looters. i have paid for subscription but it was not getting reflected. i contacted the chat service and even raised a ticket. but entire team seems to be sleeping. no one is responding

reviews.author: Soumyajit
reviews.content: Worst app experience, they delete trades which hit SL, I took a trade it's in loss and I can't even find that trade on the app now.

reviews.author: Sunny Singh
reviews.content: worst experience. I just purchased today and got 4 trades in app and all were losses. inside app they have mentioned that we as of now only handle banknifty and nifty but in reality they are giving trades for equity also which is a loss. when I am asking for refund after seeing this then agents are telling me to wait and use the subscription for one month and then we will see and review everything and the let me know. I don't understand if I don't want to use your subscription then refund it.

reviews.author: Rustam Singh Nongmaithem
reviews.content: Avoid Liquide Black - All sales, no service Rating: ⭐ ​"Horrible experience so far. Liquide Black is quick to take your money, but provides zero support afterward. The program lacks transparency, onboarding is painfully slow, and the broker integration simply does not work. It feels like a half-baked product with no backend support. Strongly recommend staying away."

reviews.author: Gauranga Kripa
reviews.content: Very disappointing experience with Liquide. I paid Rs 24999 for the Combo subscription after being promised 90 percent profitable calls and a no questions asked refund policy. In just two weeks, I lost around Rs 21000 due to low accuracy calls. Many calls were shared after the price had already moved. When I requested cancellation, the process was delayed and my ticket was closed without resolution. Not satisfied with the service or support.

reviews.author: Ujjwal Tyagi
reviews.content: App is fraud, they will give 100s of trade and some are right they will show that our predictions is correct & brand it like every trade is correct. While most of the trades are wrong & they even don't show that data again in their app interface.

reviews.author: Jyotirmay Anand
reviews.content: Very Slow app and tells us what we know already and that too very late. Its ai LIMO is even worst gives answers very late that too vague. Not woth spending 6-7000 on it.

reviews.author: birendra vishwakarma
reviews.content: once you buy thay offer again for premium subscription very bad experience, not good, false tips for short term, medium and long term investment.

reviews.author: Manu
reviews.content: this one is not good aap i purchased this app for a whole year but they never send any best trade i purchased 4-5 stocks for the long term. But all are in loss and now they want more money for trades . I strongly didn't recommend this app for trades.

reviews.author: Kapil Saxena
reviews.content: App designed only to capture annual subscription from the clients. no substantial evidence that their levels actually works or not. Their primary focus is on annual subscriptions only. these type of apps keep the clients in dark. Not trustworthy as per my recommendation.

reviews.author: Indian Grooves
reviews.content: Its a big scam do not buy their subscription. 90% of their stocks are in loss. Right when check past trades to know their performance, when you click on the past trades. Go to ongoing section and check their performance. Only then you buy.

reviews.author: Rithik Rai
reviews.content: they have totally lost focus to be honest. They used to give great recommendations before but now the recommendations are totally off! some of them have been there for a year or two and have just gone down down. They just keep pushing their new product that is "Arjun" asking liquide users to buy that and their normal liquide app is now a back burner for these guys. Their founder keeps giving lectures on Linkedin about the whole world but their app recommendations are going down the drain.

reviews.author: Vijayan Ramamoorthy
reviews.content: I am having issues to receive OTP SMS for my mobile number in this app. when I contacted support team, they are not responding to my query for almost 2 weeks. Very worst support service.

reviews.author: Anupam Mukherjee
reviews.content: They recommend stocks when it has already started rising, so when they recommend the price if they recommend 150, when you will actually open your app and buy it will become 155, also lately most of their recommendations resulting in loss,in the notification they will mention we got 18 profit,19 profit,but in real life most of them results in losses.

reviews.author: Karan Padhiyar
reviews.content: i recently made a purchase of liquide one plan. The money was deducted from my bank, however no plan was activated and there is no response from customer support too. This is plain horrible. I want a refund of my money.

reviews.author: A watcher
reviews.content: They suggest trades with past values. Its a clear scam. They'll say but at 100rs, target is 125rs and even if you open the trading app in 2 seconds, the price is already 104-105. You think target is way high, so u buy at 105. As soon as the price goes up to 106-107, they notify to book partial profit and move stop loss to 100 - at cost. Later they show in result of 7rs profit earned. Whereas, actually you earn only 1 or 2 rs that too if you're quick enough to book it. Else -5 loss at 100rs SL.

reviews.author: Jayant Kulkarni
reviews.content: Improve your App experience, notification when clicked does not open app or sometimes does not open with appropriate detail as per notification..

reviews.author: Kudari Roshan
reviews.content: Most of their trade recommendations are sham, especially the one showing a high upside. Not very trustworthy.

reviews.author: naveen prakash Yadav
reviews.content: They showed first that their targets are being hit daily, but when you take subscription and pay money, you are asked to take another plans. You will not get correct recommendations and whatever they give, next day they will ask to exit. However the messages come to your inbox or on whatsapp that 8 out of 9 targets hit. Now for those tips you have to take one more subscription

reviews.author: Rajiv Kumar
reviews.content: It's a good app, no doubt int that. Though the problem is their recommendation comes very fast and it's not always possible to complete the transaction right after getting recommendations. Most of the time, after getting recommendations, by the time I open app to complete the transaction, the stock moved out of price range. It's only for short term trades. Also for short term trades it'd useful only for large capital, otherwise after deductions of all the chargs, you left with nominal profit.

reviews.author: sharad tiwari
reviews.content: If you want an app that just tell you buy or not to buy (mostly buy will be the answer) . There is no details report analysis of the company for your understanding. The news they provide are mostly link to trade view or moneycontrol which are again limited . Charts do not have access of full controls of functions as they are third party. Look like I wasted my money

reviews.author: Chinmoy Bhattacharya
reviews.content: It's a mediocre app...they calculate their returns in the most optimistic way which are nearly impossible to execute by use. The high rating seems that they are not genuine nature. The app is good for getting details about particular stock but that information is usually free at other sites

reviews.author: Mohammad Ameenuddin
reviews.content: I used this app for a while, but it's not suitable for beginners at all. The app seems fine initially, but as soon as you start asking about stocks, it demands coins. And to purchase those coins, it charges an exorbitant amount. This app is not worth it for beginners, as you could buy some good stocks with that much money. Therefore, I'm giving this app only 2 stars.

reviews.author: Anil Upadhyay
reviews.content: Tried to Synch my portfolio in HDFC securities (my Broker) to Liquide app but only mutual fund was synced and stocks were not synced with the app. Pl resolve the issue.

reviews.author: M Mittal
reviews.content: Just uninstalled after 10 days. Could not even use to suggest others in group how good or effective app it is and it started asking for making purchase of coin. Paid moneycontrol 100rs for pro membership n got much better info. Should give an year of free access so people like me can look at numbers from stocks picled up based on reports.

reviews.author: Agenda Baddy
reviews.content: No IPO updates now, which this app previously used to provide. Also one of the big broker INDmoney is also missing. Then howcome I can think of proceeding with the services.

reviews.author: Rajkumar gupta (Raj)
reviews.content: I don't understand why contacts, photos, videos, purchase history data is being collected! I don't buy it ! If it were only to provide the stocks insights. Highly sensitive data is comprised! I won't recommend! I belive the app's motive is just more than the providing tech details!

reviews.author: Anirban Mohanty (am954)
reviews.content: I came across Liquide through one of their Instagram ads. While the video lectures and content are quite good and should be used by all amateur traders, their recommendations are quite bad in my experience. I have mostly booked losses on their recommendations despite their cadence reports of beating the market. I won't recommend this to people who want to blindly trust stock recos.

reviews.author: Srijan Eppalapally
reviews.content: The btst recommendations, which is their flagship offering are very difficult to make use of. Most of their recommendations offer a potential upside of 2-3% . The stocks surge the recommended buy range rapidly in a matter of minutes, which leaves us in a situation which is as good as not having their subscription.

reviews.author: jetty vijaymohan
reviews.content: This app was good provideding some good information but the main problem is that i am unable to delink my brokerage account there is no such option there was no response no proper communication to reach out only WhatsApp through they were not responsible immediately don't add your broker account once you link you can't delink yourself they can't do it from there end but we will do it but they don't there is chance to misuse of your portfolio data leaks

reviews.author: Ayush Sanghavi
reviews.content: App has good features but everything inside is costing money which is the worst thing. Even Groww and AngelOne don't ask for money we can invest anywhere and about knowledge they also have good predicting skills. Just making a good looking UI don't work. Remove payment option and then you will get more success. Or else you are cursed.

reviews.author: Bala R
reviews.content: I like the app's UI. But, many holdings in your portfolio doesn't show up correctly in Liquide. The app developers should ensure that the portfolio holdings should be synced properly to reflect the actual holdings to get a real picture of how our portfolio performs.

reviews.author: Sachin Raj
reviews.content: Not a good experience so far!! There is issue in basket as it keeps on giving prompt for repair with higher amount. Return from basket is not good as well !! Support team is also not much helpful.

reviews.author: Darshan Gupta
reviews.content: Sometimes notifications are confusion. I get same notification multiple times. Trade recommendations come on Telegram and we must open the link and then the app, which is time-consuming. And app It would be very helpful if recommendations were provided directly in the app with Stock Name, CMP, Target, Stop Loss, and duration, along with quick execution.

reviews.author: Nirav Barot
reviews.content: it's just informative app, no hand hold support for proper trading ideas for equity Trade, once in a while it gives 1 tip.

reviews.author: Shah Mohammed
reviews.content: After the recent upgrade rebalance became a painful act. it's load forever while trying to rebalance meanwhile stocks have already been bought or sold.

reviews.author: Nikita Gupta
reviews.content: This app helps users invest in stocks and mutual funds with ease. They are reliable, fast, and suitable for beginners.

reviews.author: Chethan Kumar
reviews.content: Neither good nor bad. do your own research before investing. I don't have gain from using this app. some stocks searched good yield. overall it's ok app.

reviews.author: Avinash Nalode
reviews.content: The app is good. Good UI. Stock assistance by LIMO is good. But don't go for their Arjun product, which degrades all their performance. One of the worst futures and options suggestion platform that they have. No confident strategy that they imply. They provide calls on telegram channels, and the price gets fluctuated so much, and you can't buy at the recommended price. Because of it, your risk to reward ratio doesn't make any sense. There would be more losses that you would make.

reviews.author: Nitin
reviews.content: Liquid team is good, overall is also good but their promotion ads are really setback even you got their membership you are forced to watch it...and when you click on their notification on you mobile it takes you to that infor but again due to ads it got closes and then hard to find that notification about.... I am member from last 10 months.

reviews.author: Prashant kanoo
reviews.content: I recently paid the subscription price and had got the access. First ghing i noticed was that its ask for a feedback everytime i login or change page.. WTH.. Seriously..! Initial trades has run into losses though market overall is bearish though these recommendation are good if only they beat the market. recent 1.8% and 2 % exit won't get me even my subscription fee back.. Anticipating the rest of the year would be good. Liked Limo reporting though and the clear interface..!

reviews.author: Atul Sharma
reviews.content: On paid plan, app forces kyc but it didn't load anything to do the kyc. stuck

reviews.author: Sina Avhad
reviews.content: Order placements and executions are fast, reducing the risk of missed opportunities in volatile markets. Most transactions are processed without noticeable delays. The app launches swiftly, and navigating between different sections, such as portfolio tracking, market insights, and order placement, is seamless.

reviews.author: Gu Guj
reviews.content: As someone who follows the markets daily, I’ve tried quite a few platforms, but Liquide delivers a refreshing experience. The instant stock research feature saves me a ton of time when screening opportunities. The detailed stock card insights make complex data easy to digest, and the trade recommendations have added real value to my portfolio strategy. For anyone serious about building long-term wealth, this app easily provides the best stock recommendation service in a clean.

reviews.author: Aruj Sharma
reviews.content: The market sentimeter does not show the current day scenario, it shows previous days cases, please show the current day sentiments of the market. When we duplicate any report on LIMO it track us back to the reports section where we cannot search any stock that we previously got a report of, please enable the feature to search stock reports on LIMO. And moreover we can see the stock FORECAST of manyy well known stocks and they are not enough, please show forecast of all of the stocks.

reviews.author: TUSHAR GUJRAL
reviews.content: Not very effective app. Half of their predictions are false and they remove those from their records to show high accuracy. (Random guesses have 50% probability of being correct and that's what they are doing) Also, their backend is messed up. Most of the times fails to sync my portfolio with broker or fetch MF portfolio. Hire better developers at least.

reviews.author: Anubhav Bimbisariye
reviews.content: The worst thing about this app is the information confusion. There are so many open calls that you can't see anywhere. I choose to invest without connecting to broker and I have no way to check if my active trades are still active or liquid has recommended an exit. So many of the trades have gone downhill with no clue as to when liquid recommends and when it exits. Not all notification come on WhatsApp either. Shady info hiding practices going on here.

reviews.author: krishna kumar Yadav
reviews.content: BTST notification not comming timely. It comes once after price is out of recommended range most of time. App has also not clean GUI , make trade section simple, with closed trades and ongoing trade section. I do not like swipe left and right. Instead of btst please provide some more short term trades or swing trades in month at least 10 to 15. Overall app GUI is not clean and clear. It is confusing. Make it simple to understand.

reviews.author: Neha Patil
reviews.content: If you’re serious about building wealth through the stock market, the Liquiside App is a game-changer. It provides best stock recommendations tailored for both beginners and experienced traders. The instant stock research feature is a lifesaver, giving you up-to-date insights without spending hours analyzing charts. The stock card insights are detailed and easy to understand, helping you make informed decisions quickly.

reviews.author: Lalrinfela Hmar
reviews.content: App navigation is slow compared to smallcase. I have subscribed to 3 baskets. But unlike smallcase app, we are able to see only the current return. Kindly add Realized return,dividend, total return(realized return+dividend+current return)..only then can we know, how the basket performed over time

reviews.author: Debmalya De Sarkar
reviews.content: Ui can be improved. It's too much of saturation in the colors. It's difficult to track where should I look at ... It looks every thing as imprtent to look at ... Which is not a good UI exprence.

reviews.author: Ankush Batra
reviews.content: Decent platform, but advertising practices are dubious. Their ad says they're offering a discount up to 74%. They offer only quarterly or annual membership, and I only see a 27% discount on both options. If you're not offering a 74% discount on either option, then why advertise it as 74%.

reviews.author: Sneha Mohite
reviews.content: Liquide is the ultimate app for investors, with smarter wealth-building strategies. It provides the best stock recommendations that guarantee an informed decision with data support. Its Instant Stock Research and detailed Stock Card Insights make complex market analysis more accessible, even to beginners. Additionally, Liquide offers actionable trade recommendations tailored to individual financial goals, a must-have for anyone serious about growing their portfolio effectively.

reviews.author: abhinav patel
reviews.content: One of the best platforms for wealth generation. Gives best stock and trade recommendations. Helped and taught me alot. would definitely recommend.

reviews.author: Sanika Thakur
reviews.content: This app is really helpful for managing Wealth and making informed decisions. It provides the best stock recommendation with clear explanations. I like the instant stock research feature which saves a lot of time. The stock card insights are easy to understand and very useful. Overall, the trade recommendations feel reliable and well-researched.

reviews.author: Anupriya
reviews.content: I like how trade recommendations are straight forward after instant Stock research, best one for wealth creation.

reviews.author: Preeti
reviews.content: Best app for growing wealth and stock knowledge.

reviews.author: Shobha santosh Shetty
reviews.content: Love how this app makes wealth building feel easy ...instant stock research and stock card insights are super handy .The trade recommendations are spot on, definitely the best stock recommendation app i have tried.

reviews.author: Shrusti Dayma
reviews.content: Liquide is a clean and easy-to-use investment app that offers helpful insights for tracking and analyzing your portfolio. It’s a decent option for investors looking for simple guidance. nnInvest smart, stay informed

reviews.author: vandana agarwal
reviews.content: I like that Liquide makes investing simple and helps in wealth creation. The stock card insights explain data clearly, but they feel too basic for advanced users. The instant stock research is quick, though sometimes major updates come late. The best stock recommendation works well, but it could be reviewed more often. Trade recommendations are useful, but they should be more personalized to different goals.

reviews.author: Amish Hospital
reviews.content: gives reasonable idea to keep stock hold, sell

reviews.author: Shristi Gusain
reviews.content: Best stock recommendation. it give best stock insights . fully satisfied 🤌

reviews.author: Aastha Dhama
reviews.content: Stock card insights give complete overview instantly

reviews.author: Shagun Agarwal
reviews.content: As someone still learning about investments, I find Liquide very easy to use. The stock card insights make financial data quite simple to understand. The app gives some of the best stock recommendations, and the instant stock research helps me stay updated quickly. Liquide’s trade recommendations guide me to make better choices and grow my wealth with more confidence.

reviews.author: 18STEPSINVESCO
reviews.content: The design asthetics of this app is excellent. Got all the required info and neatly presented. Wondering why they din't have a direct discount broking app themselves for stocks and mutual funds instead of connecting to 3rd party brokers. I've would have preferred it for investment. But not good for trades / FO as the app response is slow at times.

reviews.author: Biswas Dilip
reviews.content: Best stock recommendation service with transparency.

reviews.author: Ritiksha Wagh
reviews.content: Downloaded the app and received the best stock recommendation Highly recommended!

reviews.author: sarika sarsambe
reviews.content: Liquide is a popular stock analysis and investment advisory app with high user ratings and an intuitive interface that many beginners and intermediate investors find helpful. It offers AI-driven insights, portfolio health checks, and investment recommendations to help users make more informed decisions

reviews.author: Bhumika Singh
reviews.content: I've been using this app for a while now and it has genuinely helped me build my confidence in investing. The stock cards insights are very easy to understand and save me a lot of time. I also like how quickly I can do instant shock research without jumping between multiple platforms.

reviews.author: Shreya Srivastava
reviews.content: I’ve been using the Liquid App for my trades, and the recommendations have been spot-on. The app provides clear, well-researched trade suggestions that fit perfectly with my trading style. The real-time updates and easy-to-understand analysis help me make quick, informed decisions. It’s made trading smoother and more successful for me. Definitely worth checking out!

reviews.author: Varuna Singh
reviews.content: Since joining LiquideOne in July, I've seen a substantial improvement in my trading performance. The platform's accuracy in trade recommendations and the wealth of strategic insights it provides are unparalleled. LiquideOne offers a comprehensive approach to investing, combining state-of-the-art technology, expert analysis, and a range of investment options to suit various risk profiles. It's more than just a trading platform; it's a vital partner in my quest for finanical quest.

reviews.author: Darshil Singh Bisht
reviews.content: I’ve been using Liquide for a few weeks now and it has completely changed the way I manage my investments. The instant stock research feature is super quick and helps me stay updated. I really liked the stock card insights which make it easier to understand a company’s fundamentals. Overall one of the best apps for long-term wealth creation

reviews.author: Cadet URVASHI BHARTI
reviews.content: it is best stock recommendation it helps me a lot great app for investing , trade recommendation and a lot to experience have great information about trade , stock markets, investments and a lot more things specifically great for beginners to learn it has enough content and different options to use and utilise effortlessly according to our need

reviews.author: Rajni Maurya
reviews.content: This stock market app is a very useful platform for both beginners and experienced investors. It provides real-time updates, detailed charts, and accurate market insights that help users make informed decisions. The interface is clean and user-friendly, making it easy to navigate through different sections like portfolio tracking, watchlists, and market news.

reviews.author: Livinus Dungdung
reviews.content: Excellent experience with Liquide! The app is smooth, reliable, and very easy to use. Everything works exactly as expected, and the interface looks professional. Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Dhamo
reviews.content: Really good app for stock investing, especially for beginners. The interface is simple and easy to understand. Buying and tracking stocks is smooth, and the insights are helpful. Overall, a reliable app for anyone looking to start or manage investments.

reviews.author: Tanvi Katal
reviews.content: A great app for anyone serious about building wealth. The instant stock research is fast and useful, and the stock card insights give a clear picture without confusion. Best stock recommendation and trade recommendations features make decision-making much easier.

reviews.author: Anshu 57
reviews.content: Wealth, stock market insights, and trade recommendations all in one place. Accurate analysis with smart strategies that actually help in decision-making.

reviews.author: Aastha Raj
reviews.content: Great app for building wealth. The instant stock research and stock card insights make it very easy to understand stocks. Really helpful trade recommendations.

reviews.author: Versha Singh
reviews.content: Perfect for anyone focused on wealth creation. Offers instant stock research, smart stock card insights, and reliable trade recommendations. Truly stands out for best stock recommendations!

reviews.author: Neelam Nath
reviews.content: Best stock recommendations. This app has helped me to build my wealth and understanding stock market as a beginner.

reviews.author: Parveen Taya
reviews.content: really good app for stock investing, especially for beginners. The interface is simple and easy to understand.

reviews.author: Rakesh Purty
reviews.content: Liquide is a SEBI-registered stock advisory app that provides AI-powered stock recommendations (LiMo) and curated portfolios ("baskets") to simplify investing. While users praise its intuitive interface, reviews are polarizing, very nice app

reviews.author: Anjali _
reviews.content: Great app for managing Wealth in a smarter way. The Best Stock recommendation feature is clear and easy to follow. Instant Stock Research and Stock card insights make analysis quick and simple. Very useful for daily decisions.

reviews.author: Dipika Chhetri
reviews.content: Great usability with instant stock research and clear recommendations. Stock insights are easy to understand and genuinely useful—overall a great experience

reviews.author: KASHVI
reviews.content: Great app for building wealth with instant stock research and clear stock card insights. The trade recommendations are very helpful for making smarter investment decisions.

reviews.author: Gautam Roy
reviews.content: A Smart Companion for Weath Building application. Best Stock recommendations provided to your Investment Goals. The Instant Stock Research functionality is a game changer. Another highlight is the stock card insights feature, which provide snapshots of stocks health, valuation and potential. The Trade recommendations are particularly valuable. In Summary, this app is more just an investing app; It's a robust platform designed to help users grow their wealth with precision and confidence.

reviews.author: Shreya More
reviews.content: Very smooth app for instant stock research. The stock card insights give a quick overview and help compare options easily. Trade recommendations are well-organized and easy to follow. Overall, Liquide feels professional and reliable.

reviews.author: Santosh Rawat
reviews.content: Awesome app for your portfolio review on stocks and mutual funds. Easy to understand even for beginners. Recommendation is also available if you should hold or sell your stocks based on past performance and records.

reviews.author: 10_CST_Anushri Kale
reviews.content: Liquid is very useful for investors. It provides best stock recommendation with clear data and instant stock research, which saves a lot of time. The stock card insights are easy to understand and help in quick decision-making. it’s a reliable app

reviews.author: Mohamed Nasir
reviews.content: I've started using the app fand I’m impressed with its suggestions. The interface is clean and the insights have helped me make better decisions. Keep up the good work!

reviews.author: Avni Gupta
reviews.content: best stock recommendations. I m using this app from quite some time just love how it is built. amazing.

reviews.author: Shikha Yadav
reviews.content: This app gives best stock recommendations and provide instant stock research.
